Manufacturer=
ProvidedBy=Choong Keat Yian
Comment=The Crescendo 15B and 18B are intended for high level, high power low frequency reproduction in ported enclosures. They feature vented die cast chassis and composite glass fibre and black anodized aluminium coil formers, yeilding extremely low thermal compression. Both employ high rigidity cone membranes in order to offer freedom from breakup and associated distortion at extremely high sound pressure levels. Extended levels of linear excursion are possible due to long throw motor systems coupled with large flexure suspensions. ��Usable frequency range (-6dB) 33Hz - 2kHz

Comment=The unique PD.2450 is a high power 24" cone transducer, designed specifically to provide powerful bass, sub bass frequencies.��This splendid unit has a 6" voice coil capable of dissipating heat build up when driven to its 1000 Watt input. A further advantage is the double suspension system, which maintains a pure piston action for the moving mass.��The PD.2450 offers a fast responsive sound and is an outstanding drive unit, suitable for all systems.   �30 - 1 kHz

files.content:
[Driver]
Brand=Precision Devices
Model=PD.107
Manufacturer=
ProvidedBy=Choong Keat Yian
Comment=Designed primarily as a high power, mid frequency driver, the large magnet gives excellent control and thermal compression properties. The PD.107 is the ideal choice when supporting our 15",18" and 21" bass drivers in high power systems which need extra power handling compared to the PD.102ER. It is equally well suited to direct radiating and compression (horn) loaded designs.

files.name: Precision Devices PD.1550
files.content:
[Driver]
Brand=Precision Devices
Model=PD.1550
Manufacturer=
ProvidedBy=Choong Keat Yian
Comment=The PD.1550 is a high power, high efficiency cone transducer designed specifically to provide powerful and accurate bass frequencies with minimal distortion and power compression.��Research has resulted in the development of an advanced magnetic assembly which incorporates a composite alloy and steel pole piece giving a uniform and stable magnetic field, improving linear excursion and providing an efficient thermal path to dissipate the heat produced by the voice coil. The motor assembly generates a BL product of 26T/M which is exceptional for a transducer of this type. It is this approach which contributes to the speed, accuracy and fidelity of the unit and maintains control of the cone under the most demanding operating conditions.��Manufacturing tolerances are extremely high and are combined with stringent quality control procedures whilst each component of the PD.1550 is selected to give exemplary electro-acoustic performance and long term reliability in all types of professional applications.��The PD.1550 is suitable for both sound reinforcement and high power studio monitors in a variety of enclosure types since it allows enclosure designers considerably more freedom with specialised loading techniques without having to make the allowances for physical characteristics or power handling limitations which are typically the result of more traditional designs.

files.name: Precision Devices PD.156
files.content:
[Driver]
Brand=Precision Devices
Model=PD.156
Manufacturer=
ProvidedBy=Choong Keat Yian
Comment=This unit features a sophisticated dual suspension (dual spider) combined with a unique 115mm (4.5") voice coil. The large surface area of the copper windings in the voice coil assists in dissipating the heat generated by high power inputs which allows high power handling and reduced thermal compression. The cone and voice coil components are maintained in pure piston motion even when complex signals are applied upto the rated power. Combined with close engineering tolerances, these features allow for substantial short-term transient overload without damage. Performance is optimised for concert and disco systems, P.A., keyboard L.F. and bass guitar when operating in reflex systems.      ��Up to 1.5 KHz

Comment=This splendid 18 inch, low frequency unit has a massive 125mm (5") voice coil, capable of dissipating the tremendous heat build up when driven in concert conditions up to, and for short duration beyond, its 600 watt input. A further valuable consideration is the huge copper area and breathing arrangement of the voice coil which ensures superior power compression performance. A further advantage is the double suspension (dual spider) system, which maintains a pure piston action for the moving mass even when driven with the most complex programme input signals. This is an outstanding, very high power bass and sub bass drive unit suitable for all systems demanding the best possible L.F���Upto 2Khz�

files.name: Precision Devices PD.2150
files.content:
[Driver]
Brand=Precision Devices
Model=PD.2150
Manufacturer=
ProvidedBy=Choong Keat Yian
Comment=The PD.2150 is a unique high power, high efficiency cone transducer designed specifically to provide powerful and accurate low and sub-bass frequencies with minimal distortion and power compression.��It features a 152mm (6") voice coil assembly, the largest ever employed in a cone transducer. This forms the heart of the magnetic assembly and, when coupled with the 305mm (12") ceramic magnet, results in a motor of unprecedented power. (EL product 34T/M).��Research has resulted in the development of an advanced magnetic assembly which incorporates a composite alloy and steel pole piece giving a uniform and stable magnetic field, improving linear excursion and providing an efficient thermal path to dissipate the heat produced by the voice coil. A sophisticated double suspension maintains pure axial movement ensuring that the voice coil is correctly centred at all times. It is this approach which contributes to the speed, accuracy and fidelity of the unit and maintains control of the cone under the most demanding operating conditions. Manufacturing tolerances are extremely high and are combined with stringent quality control procedures whilst each component of the PD.2150 is selected to give exemplary electro-acoustic performance and long term reliability in all types ofprofes- sional applications.��The PD.2150 is an outstanding transducer. Designed for use in sound reinforcement and high power studio monitors, it serves an otherwise neglected area of low frequency transducer technology. It allows enclosure designers considerably more freedom with enclosure design and loading techniques without having to make the allowances for physical characteristics or power handling limitations which are typically the result of more traditional designs.   ��30 - 1000 Hz

files.name: Selenium 10SW1
files.content:
[Driver]
Brand=Selenium
Model=10SW1
Manufacturer=
ProvidedBy=Choong Keat Yian
Comment=Automotive Line - Free Air - Sub Woofer 10SW1 - 10"��A 10" automotive subwoofer, Free Air type, especially designed for the reproduction of low frequencies on the vehicle cover. This, however, does not prevent that the 10SW1 be installed in acoustic boxes, which enables a better bass response, with a smaller cone displacement, that is: better performance with higher durability. The subwoofer features a cellulose cone with long fibers, receiving a special treatment with an acrylic resin of high resistance and adherence, protecting the loudspeaker from the effects of intense light and from excessive moisture and dust.��The frame in steel plate features a new design, more reinforced and with a finishing in epoxy paint, providing the 10SW1 a great mechanical resistance and high structural rigidity. The new connection terminals, gold plated, are comfortable to use and ensure a perfect contact on the connections. The suspension in Polyurethane is linear, without mechanical brakes and exempt of distortions. It also receives the applications of an acrylic copolymer base composite, which improves its resistance to UV rays.��The cap, manufactured in special fabric, provides the product with a better performance, enhancing its design. The long coil, made with special copper wire, resistant to high temperatures, is coiled in Kapton � shape. The centering (damper) is made of Polyamide Fiber fabric especially developed for this application providing the mobile assembly with great linearity on the excursion and high damping at low frequencies.���The use of high resistance adhesives ensures to the components an excellent pasting and great durability. The magnetic assembly features a necked washer, which allows large excursions, when necessary.

files.name: Selenium 12SW1
files.content:
[Driver]
Brand=Selenium
Model=12SW1
Manufacturer=
ProvidedBy=Choong Keat Yian
Comment=A 12" automotive subwoofer, Free Air type, especially designed for the reproduction of low frequencies on the vehicle cover. This, however, does not prevent that the 12SW1 be installed in acoustic boxes, which enables a better bass response, with a smaller cone displacement, that is: better performance with higher durability.��The subwoofer features a cellulose cone with long fibers, receiving a special treatment with an acrylic resin of high resistance and adherence, protecting the loudspeaker from the effects of intense light and from excessive moisture and dust.The frame in steel plate features a new design, more reinforced and with a finishing in epoxy paint, providing the 12SW1 a great mechanical resistance and high structural rigidity.��The new connection terminals, gold plated, are comfortable to use and ensure a perfect contact on the connections. The suspension in Polyurethane is linear, without mechanical brakes and exempt of distortions. It also receives the applications of an acrylic copolymer base composite, which improves its resistance to UV rays. The cap, manufactured with special fabric, provides the product a better performance, enhancing its design. The long coil, made with special copper wire, resistant to high temperatures, is coiled in Kapton � shape. The centering (damper) is made of Polyamide Fiber fabric especially developed for this application providing the mobile assembly a great linearity on the excursion and a high damping at low frequencies. The use of high resistance adhesives ensures the components an excellent pasting and great durability. The magnetic assembly features a necked washer, which allows large excursions, when necessary.

files.content:
[Driver]
Brand=Selenium
Model=4MR2
Manufacturer=
ProvidedBy=Choong Keat Yian
Comment=Automotive Line - Bass - Mid Range 4MR2 - 4"��A Mid Range, with 40 H.M.S. of impedance, specially developer to reproduce the frequencies of the audio specter that are placed between the deep and acute sounds, in other words the zone of mediums. The loudspeakers kind MID-Range must work with other speakers able to reproduce the low frequencies, besides the tweeters, that will reproduce the superior extremity of the audible specter. The SELENIUM's MID-RANGES are projected to produce a fiddle answer, with low distortion levels and free from undesirable colors.��The use of high technology materials on the cones, Kapton� in the shape of the reels and resistant adhesives and high temperatures guarantee the high development and the big reliability of the MID-RANGES made by SELENIUM.�The suspension ring, the high compliance, it's made of latex with polychloroprene base, being adequate to the stationary ways muffling lone using long-fiber cellulose, adequate to produce excellent frequency answer in the work circle.��The reel has Kapton� body and copper wire plastered with special polish to stand high temperatures.�They may be installed on door or panels, preferably turned to the listener, since the directionality becomes quite accentuated in to the listener, since the directionality becomes quite accentuated in this frequency circle (and above it).���They need frequency divisors (crossovers) actives and passives to avoid damage that would be certainly provoked by the low frequencies.��100-10000 Hz

ProvidedBy=Choong Keat Yian
Comment=Automotive Line - Free Air - Mid Range 5MR1 - 5"��A 5" midrange, Free Air type, especially designed for the reproduction of medium frequencies, can be installed at the side, the doors, foot or cover. The loudspeaker features a cellulose cone with long fibers, receiving a special treatment with an acrylic resin of high resistance and adherence, protecting the loudspeaker from the effects of intense light, and from excessive moistures and dust. The suspension in Polyurethane is linear, without mechanical brakes and is exempt from distortions. It also receives the applications of an acrylic copolymer base composite, which improves its resistance to UV rays. The cap, manufactured with special fabric, provides the product with a better performance, enhancing its design. The coil, manufactured with special copper wire, resistant to high temperatures, is coiled in Kapton � shape.��The frame in reinforced steel plate and with finishing in epoxy paint provides the 5MR1 with a great mechanical resistance and high structural rigidity. The centering (damper) is made of Polyamide Fiber fabric especially developed for this application providing the mobile assembly with great linearity. The use of high resistance adhesives ensures the components an excellent pasting and great durability.��90 - 12000 Hz

The loudspeaker features a cellulose cone with long fibers, receiving a special treatment with an acrylic resin of high resistance and adherence, protecting the loudspeaker from the effects of intense light, and from excessive moistures and dust.��The frame in reinforced steel plate and with finishing in epoxy paint, provides the 6MB1 a great mechanical resistance and high structural rigidity. The magnetic assembly features a necked washer, which allows large excursions, when necessary. The suspension in Polyurethane is linear, without mechanical brakes and exempt from distortions. It also receives the applications of an acrylic copolymer base composite, which improves its resistance to UV rays. The cap, manufactured with special fabric, provides the product with better performance, enhancing its design. The coil, manufactured with special copper wire, resistant to high temperatures, is coiled in Kapton� shape.��The centering (damper) is made of Polyamide Fiber fabric especially developed for this application providing the mobile assembly with great linearity on the excursion and high damping at low. The use of high resistance adhesives ensures the components an excellent pasting and great durability.��45 - 8000 Hz

files.name: Selenium 6MB2
files.content:
[Driver]
Brand=Selenium
Model=6MB2
Manufacturer=
ProvidedBy=Choong Keat Yian
Comment=Automotive Line - Bass - Mid Bass 6MB2 - 6"��The 6MB2 is a 6" Mid Bass, with 4 Ohms of impedance, especially developed to reproduce the frequencies of the audio spectrum that are situated between the bass and the mediums , that is, the range of mid-bass. The frame in steel plate features a new design, which is more reinforced and has a finishing in epoxy paint, providing the 6MB2 with great mechanical resistance and high structural rigidity.��The fitting in SBR composite rubber, is capable of resisiting the high temperatures and the UV radiation, common in tropical climates. The Polypropylene cone, moisture resistant (high-density plastic polymer) is reinforced with carbon fibers, besides having received a load of mica. The suspension ring, of high compliance, is made of Polychloroprene based rubber, and is adequate for the damping of stationary waves.��The centering (damper) is made of Polyamide Fiber fabric especially developed for this application, providing the mobile assembly with great linearity on the excursion and high damping at low frequencies. A coil with Kapton� body and copper wire is lined with special varnish to resist high temperatures. The cap, in non-fabric, allows the heat exchange with the environment, without introducing spurious vibrations.

files.name: Selenium MB64
files.content:
[Driver]
Brand=Selenium
Model=MB64
Manufacturer=
ProvidedBy=Choong Keat Yian
Comment=Automotive Line - Predator - Mid Bass MB64 - 6"��A 6" mid-bass, Free Air type, especially designed for the reproduction of low and medium frequencies, which can be installed at the side, the doors, foot of cover. The loudspeaker features a cellulose cone with long fibers, receiving a special treatment with an acrylic resin of high resistance and adherence, protecting the loudspeaker from the effects of intense light, and from excessive moisture and dust.��The frame in steel plate with finishing in epoxy paint provides the MB64 with great mechanical resistance and high structural rigidity.The suspension in Polyurethane is linear, without mechanical brakes and exempt of distortions. The long coil, made with special copper wire, resistant to high temperatures, is coiled in Kapton � shape.�The centering (damper) is made of Polyamide Fiber fabric especially developed for this application, providing the mobile assembly with great linearity on the excursion and high damping at low frequencies.��45 - 5000 Hz��The use of high resistance adhesives ensures the components an excellent pasting and great durability.�The magnetic assembly features a necked washer, which allows large excursions, when necessary.

files.name: Selenium MR54
files.content:
[Driver]
Brand=Selenium
Model=MR54
Manufacturer=
ProvidedBy=Choong Keat Yian
Comment=Automotive Line - Predator - Mid Range MR54 - 5"��A 5" midrange, especially designed for the reproduction of medium frequencies, which can be installed at the side, doors, foot or cover. The loudspeaker features a cellulose cone with long fibers, receiving a special treatment with an acrylic resin of high resistance and adherence, protecting the loudspeaker from the effects of intense light, and from excessive moisture and dust.��The frame in reinforced steel plate and with finishing in epoxy paint, provides the MR54 great mechanical resistance and high structural rigidity. The suspension in Polyurethane is linear, without mechanical brakes and exempt from distortions. The long coil, made with special copper wire, resistant to high temperatures, is coiled in Kapton � shape.��The centering (damper) is made of Polyamide Fiber fabric especially developed for this application, providing the mobile assembly with great linearity. The use of high resistance adhesives ensures to the components an excellent pasting and great durability.��

files.name: Selenium SW104
files.content:
[Driver]
Brand=Selenium
Model=SW104
Manufacturer=
ProvidedBy=Choong Keat Yian
Comment=Automotive Line - Predator - Sub Woofer SW104 - 10"��A 10" automotive subwoofer, with 4 Ohms of impedance, Free Air type, especially designed for the reproduction of low frequencies on the vehicle cover. This, however, does not prevent that the SW104F be installed in acoustic boxes, which enables a better bass response, with a smaller cone displacement, that is better performance with higher durability.��The subwoofer features a cellulose cone with long fibers, receiving a special treatment with an acrylic resin of high resistance and adherence, protecting the loudspeaker from the effects of intense light, and from excessive moistures and dust. The frame in steel plate with finishing in epoxy paint, providing the SW108F with great mechanical resistance and high structural rigidity.��The suspension in Polyurethane is linear, without mechanical brakes and exempt from distortions. The long coil, made with special copper wire, resistant to high temperatures, is coiled in Kapton� shape. The use of high resistance adhesives ensures to the components an excellent pasting and great durability. The magnetic assembly features a necked washer, which allows large excursions, when necessary.
